result.summary: Found 4 visual issues on the page, primarily related to content clipping and truncation across multiple sections.

issues.description: Game cards in the right column of both 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections are clipped/cut off at the screen edge. Game titles like 'MAGNI PHO...', 'MUNC MI...', 'HYPERO', and 'DAR WATE' are partially visible and unreadable.
issues.suggestion: If this is a horizontal carousel, ensure a visual scroll indicator (arrow or gradient fade) communicates scrollability. Game titles should not be abruptly cropped — use overflow fade or consistent card sizing to show partial cards intentionally.

issues.description: The 'Hot Ga...' navigation tab label is truncated and the full label (likely 'Hot Games') is not visible, reducing discoverability of that section.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the navigation tab bar scrolls horizontally with proper overflow handling, or abbreviate labels more cleanly. Consider showing a scroll affordance for the tab bar.

issues.description: The bottom row of 'Top Played New Games' shows partially loaded/cut-off game thumbnails at the very bottom of the viewport with no indication of how many more rows exist.
issues.suggestion: Add a visible 'See all 26 games' CTA or pagination indicator at the bottom of the section to improve discoverability and navigation.

issues.description: The 'i' info icons on each game card appear small and low contrast against the dark card backgrounds, potentially making them hard to tap or identify for users with visual impairments.
issues.suggestion: Increase the size and contrast of the info icon buttons to meet WCAG 2.1 minimum touch target size (44x44px) and contrast ratio standards.
